name: Auth Check
shortDescription: Prints the auth/credentials env injected into the Argo pod (debug only)
description: A minimal debug node. It produces no artifacts and instead prints the auth environment Argo injects into the container (S3 access key, session token and related S3_* settings) to the execution logs, so you can verify credentials reach the pod. Debug/verification use only — do not leave in production pipelines since it logs secrets.

name.label: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this auth check node in the pipeline
